mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0201_01-01#Sql004 */ NAME AS VIEW_COMMENT FROM M_CODE WHERE START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CODE_TYPE = '99' AND CODE_1 = '01' AND CODE_2 IN ('12','17','18') ORDER BY CODE_2
